title: Mersive. -ARCHIVED-
body:
![Merive.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb160e576c9362645d2c076acacf3dc7aec4291.jpeg)
________________

![whats is this modpack about?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ff764d5ee3ee8433429b4cf2949f8ad8ba8add.png)

simple answear, immersive version of minecraft


long answear , this modpack goal is making minecraft immersive and animated as possible supporting 1.21.4 and will be updated to newer versions

_________________
ive made a trailer take a look
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zQWc1n6NyZc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


__________________
![what does it offers?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1104a6c9497c681df6efa684852d46f03012697b.png)
.new world gen

.immersive world

.animated

.3D support

.optimized experiance
__________________________
![is it hard to run ?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533b38c66e8f9a10b61aceb4cf815e6582374857.png)

no its not , **for now**
this modpack is very optimized , it can handle around 200 heavy mods
this modpack has around 70 mod , not little but, running it is veary easy
_________________
![updates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83ce24f7dddd611870e997dabbeb29bd8b8b519.png)

only adding mods or fix bugs 
updating to new version its not immposible but only if its important 

______________________
immersive advanture support ends  
________________
